content.json:
# Commit-FHL Flow Debug Dashboard
Monitors all 8 message flows: Webhook, Extraction, Graph Build, Cascade, Polling, Risk Detection, Approval, Subscription.

> App Insights ingestion lag: ~2-5 min. For sub-second live monitoring use **App Insights → Live Metrics**.
Select a tab above to explore a specific flow.

## Flow Activity Overview
Event counts per flow, binned to 5-minute intervals over the last 2 hours.

content.query:
union
  (customEvents
   | where name in ("CommitUserAction", "CommitBusinessKpi")
   | extend flow = case(
       tostring(customDimensions["featureArea"]) == "commitments", "Extraction",
       tostring(customDimensions["featureArea"]) == "graph", "GraphBuild",
       tostring(customDimensions["featureArea"]) == "approvals", "Approval",
       tostring(customDimensions["kpiType"]) == "webhook-received", "Webhook",
       "Other")
   | project timestamp, flow),
  (traces
   | extend flow = case(
       message has "WebhookHandler", "Webhook",
       message has "ExtractionPolling", "Polling",
       message has "SubscriptionManager" or message has "SubscriptionRenewal", "Subscription",
       message has "RiskDetector", "RiskDetection",
       "Other")
   | where flow != "Other"
   | project timestamp, flow)
| where timestamp > ago(2h)
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), flow
| render timechart
content.title: Events per flow (last 2h, 5-min bins)

content.query:
union
  (customEvents
   | where name in ("CommitUserAction", "CommitBusinessKpi")
   | extend component = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions["eventType"]), tostring(customDimensions["kpiType"]), name)
   | project timestamp, component, message = name),
  (traces
   | where customDimensions["CategoryName"] has "CommitApi"
   | extend component = tostring(customDimensions["CategoryName"])
   | project timestamp, component, message)
| summarize last_seen = max(timestamp), last_message = take_any(message) by component
| order by last_seen desc
content.title: Component last-seen

content.json:
## Extraction Pipeline
Funnel from raw commitments extracted → deduplicated → stored. Per-source breakdown below.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "CommitUserAction"
  and tostring(customDimensions["eventType"]) == "extract-background"
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend raw     = toint(customDimensions["raw"])
| extend deduped = toint(customDimensions["deduped"])
| extend stored  = toint(customDimensions["stored"])
| summarize avg_raw = round(avg(raw), 1), avg_deduped = round(avg(deduped), 1), avg_stored = round(avg(stored), 1), runs = count()
content.title: Extraction funnel averages (last 24h)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "CommitUserAction"
  and tostring(customDimensions["eventType"]) == "extract-background"
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend raw     = toint(customDimensions["raw"])
| extend deduped = toint(customDimensions["deduped"])
| extend stored  = toint(customDimensions["stored"])
| summarize avg_raw = avg(raw), avg_deduped = avg(deduped), avg_stored = avg(stored)
| project
    Stage   = pack_array("Raw", "Deduped", "Stored"),
    Count   = pack_array(round(avg_raw,1), round(avg_deduped,1), round(avg_stored,1))
| mv-expand Stage, Count
| project tostring(Stage), todouble(Count)
content.title: Raw → Deduped → Stored (24h averages)

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where message has_any ("Chat extractor", "Email extractor", "ADO extractor", "DriveExtractor", "PlannerExtractor", "Transcript extractor")
| extend source = case(
    message has "Chat", "Chat",
    message has "Email", "Email",
    message has "ADO", "ADO",
    message has "Drive", "Drive",
    message has "Planner", "Planner",
    message has "Transcript", "Transcript",
    "Other")
| summarize runs = count(), last_run = max(timestamp) by source
| order by runs desc
content.title: Per-source extractor runs (last 24h)

content.json:
## Live Event Log
Most recent 200 events across all flows, last 2 hours. Includes both structured `customEvents` and `traces` from ILogger.

content.query:
union
  (customEvents
   | where timestamp > ago(2h)
   | where name in ("CommitUserAction", "CommitBusinessKpi")
   | extend flow = case(
       tostring(customDimensions["featureArea"]) == "commitments", "Extraction",
       tostring(customDimensions["featureArea"]) == "graph", "GraphBuild",
       tostring(customDimensions["featureArea"]) == "approvals", "Approval",
       tostring(customDimensions["kpiType"]) == "webhook-received", "Webhook",
       "System")
   | extend component = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions["eventType"]), tostring(customDimensions["kpiType"]), name)
   | extend msg = strcat(name, ": ", component,
       iff(isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions["raw"])),      strcat(" raw=", tostring(customDimensions["raw"])), ""),
       iff(isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions["stored"])),   strcat(" stored=", tostring(customDimensions["stored"])), ""),
       iff(isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions["edges"])),    strcat(" edges=", tostring(customDimensions["edges"])), ""),
       iff(isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions["affected"])), strcat(" affected=", tostring(customDimensions["affected"])), ""),
       iff(isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions["decision"])), strcat(" decision=", tostring(customDimensions["decision"])), ""))
   | project timestamp, flow, level = "Info", component, message = msg),
  (traces
   | where timestamp > ago(2h)
   | where customDimensions["CategoryName"] has "CommitApi"
   | extend flow = case(
       message has "Webhook", "Webhook",
       message has "Extraction" or message has "Extractor" or message has "NlpPipeline", "Extraction",
       message has "DependencyLinker", "GraphBuild",
       message has "CascadeSimulator", "Cascade",
       message has "ExtractionPolling", "Polling",
       message has "RiskDetector", "RiskDetection",
       message has "TeamsMessage" or message has "Approval" or message has "AdaptiveCard", "Approval",
       message has "Subscription", "Subscription",
       "System")
   | extend level = case(severityLevel >= 3, "Error", severityLevel == 2, "Warning", "Info")
   | extend component = tostring(customDimensions["CategoryName"])
   | project timestamp, flow, level, component, message)
| order by timestamp desc
| take 200
content.title: Live event log (last 2h, newest first)

content.json:
## Errors and Warnings
Error and warning timeline (15-min bins, last 4h) and exception details.

content.query:
union
  (exceptions
   | where timestamp > ago(4h)
   | extend level = "Error"),
  (traces
   | where timestamp > ago(4h) and severityLevel >= 2
   | where customDimensions["CategoryName"] has "CommitApi"
   | extend level = iff(severityLevel >= 3, "Error", "Warning"))
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), level
| render timechart
content.title: Error and warning rate (last 4h, 15-min bins)

content.query:
union
  (exceptions
   | where timestamp > ago(4h)
   | project timestamp, type, operation = operation_Name, message = outerMessage, level = "Error"),
  (traces
   | where timestamp > ago(4h) and severityLevel >= 2
   | where customDimensions["CategoryName"] has "CommitApi"
   | project timestamp, type = "Trace", operation = cloud_RoleName, message, level = iff(severityLevel >= 3, "Error", "Warning"))
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: Recent errors and warnings (last 4h)

content.json:
## Background Services Health
Polling cycle status and subscription management health.

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions["CategoryName"] has "ExtractionPollingService"
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize
    last_cycle   = max(timestamp),
    total_cycles = count()
| extend last_cycle_ago = format_timespan(now() - last_cycle, "hh:mm:ss")
content.title: Polling service (last 24h)

content.query:
traces
| where customDimensions["CategoryName"] has_any ("SubscriptionManager", "SubscriptionRenewal")
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(severityLevel >= 3) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Subscription events (last 24h, 1h bins)

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where customDimensions["CategoryName"] has_any ("ExtractionPollingService", "SubscriptionManager", "SubscriptionRenewal")
| extend component = tostring(customDimensions["CategoryName"])
| extend level = case(severityLevel >= 3, "Error", severityLevel == 2, "Warning", "Info")
| project timestamp, component, level, message
| order by timestamp desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent background service events (last 24h)

content.json:
## Approval Flow
Decision breakdown and recent approval events (last 24h).

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "CommitUserAction"
  and tostring(customDimensions["eventType"]) == "approval"
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend decision = tostring(customDimensions["decision"])
| summarize count() by decision
content.title: Approval decisions (last 24h)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "CommitUserAction"
  and tostring(customDimensions["eventType"]) == "approval"
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize
    total        = count(),
    approved     = countif(tostring(customDimensions["decision"]) == "approve"),
    skipped      = countif(tostring(customDimensions["decision"]) == "skip"),
    edited       = countif(tostring(customDimensions["decision"]) == "edit")
content.title: Approval totals (last 24h)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "CommitUserAction"
  and tostring(customDimensions["eventType"]) == "approval"
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend decision = tostring(customDimensions["decision"])
| extend result   = tostring(customDimensions["result"])
| extend userId   = tostring(customDimensions["userId"])
| project timestamp, decision, result, userId
| order by timestamp desc
| take 20
content.title: Last 20 approval events
